name: Sinsera Blackbox (RaspyJack + Flipper bridge)
description: RaspyJack + Sinsera Flipper Companion combined onto one Pi Zero 2 W. LCD-driven standalone use (RaspyJack) OR Ark-driven Flipper-Zero bridge over USB — both available simultaneously. Authorization: USE ONLY ON HARDWARE YOU OWN AND NETWORKS YOU HAVE WRITTEN PERMISSION TO TEST.

preconfigured.udev_rule: /dev/flipper → first Flipper Zero seen by USB ID 0483:5740

first_boot_sequence: DietPi finishes its standard first-boot setup
Flipper: pip3 install pyserial; drops /opt/flipper/flipper-bridge.py; installs udev rule
system reboots once (so SPI dtoverlay + udev rules take effect)
after reboot: LCD HAT comes alive; Flipper plugged into the USB hub gets /dev/flipper
operator_paths: Standalone: walk around with the Pi, use the LCD + joystick to drive RaspyJack
Ark / Mac: Can't Phish Here → RaspyJack tab dispatches commands via SSH Runner
Ark / Mac: Can't Phish Here → Flipper tab dispatches Flipper commands (when Flipper is plugged in)
